steps.title: Identify the contextual signal
steps.content: The text warns it would be tempting but inadvisable to treat meteorite geochemistry as ______ Mars's interior. The blank describes treating meteorites as stand-ins or substitutes for direct samples — a plausible but ultimately limited approach.

steps.title: Match the choice
steps.content:
Proxies for means stand-ins or substitutes — exactly what scientists tempt themselves to use when they can't sample Mars directly.

Contrivances of (artificial creations), catalysts of (triggers), and deterrents to (preventers) don't fit the substitution context.

That matches choice A — A is correct.
